name: public-legal-messy-15
description: Direct-download public legal-style eval bundle with 13 files across five messy-document categories, capped at five pages per file.
license_notes: Prefer federal or official public sources. SEC filings are public EDGAR records but not necessarily federal-authored public-domain works; review source terms before redistributing downloaded copies.
task: Review the supplied public evaluation documents and produce a grounded case fact summary covering documents reviewed, material facts that appear supported, requested actions, and data-quality flags an operator should verify.
